part1.question: Do you work or are you a student?
part1.followUp: What do you enjoy most about your work or studies?

part1.question: What kind of books do you like to read?
part1.followUp: Do you prefer reading physical books or e-books?

part1.question: How often do you read for pleasure?
part1.followUp: Has your reading habit changed over the years?

part1.question: Did you enjoy reading when you were a child?
part1.followUp: What was your favourite book as a child?

part2.cueCard: Describe a book that you enjoyed reading because you had to think a lot.
bulletPoints: why you decided to read it
and explain why you enjoyed reading it because you had to think a lot
followUpQuestions: Do you think reading is still important in the digital age?
What kinds of books are most popular in your country?
How do you think reading habits will change in the future?
